form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming came from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Kyneton Cg&E Bm56 on February 27 over 1218m, on a slow track; nose behind Geegee Jet By with 61.5kg at $3.90. Second-up raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at this track 0 - 62 on March 26 over 1400m, on a wet track; 3.5 len behind Captain Cat carrying 58.5kg at $5.50. Capable of a better showing. Improver well in the mix.
